reviews.comment:
Malísima la atención telefónica al socio, encima vitalicio. En el taller de Palermo me dejaron colgada.

(Translated by Google)
The telephone service for members, especially lifetime members, was terrible. They left me hanging at the Palermo workshop.

reviews.comment:
Es excelente como todo lo que es el acá. Utilicé hasta sus servicios de turismo y hoteles propios. Muy bueno y recomendable

(Translated by Google)
It's excellent, like everything else here. I even used their tourism services and their own hotels. Very good and highly recommended.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Good service overall

reviews.comment:
La atención muy buena, pago con una aplicación, la cual me ofrece algún descuento. Un poco caótica la organización para ingresar, ya que, en mi caso trato de ubicarme a la izquierda de la isla donde están las mangueras para que quede del mismo lado que tengo la tapa para combustible. Por lo otro bien. Mucho movimiento en la zona del market. Entiendo que es una estación de servicios grande.

(Translated by Google)
The service was very good; I paid with an app, which offered me a discount. The organization for entering was a bit chaotic, as I tried to position myself to the left of the island where the pumps are so that it was on the same side as my fuel cap. Otherwise, everything was fine. There was a lot of activity in the convenience store area. I understand it's a large service station.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtbDZ5cmt3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Es un desastre siempre que voy hay cola a la noche porque tienen un solo surtidor disponible sino quieren laburar pongan los surtidores automáticos

(Translated by Google)
It's a disaster. Every time I go there's a line at night because they only have one pump available. If they don't want to work, they should put in automatic pumps.
